ko: 월 18.8일 비가 와 야외 일정에 유의
en: Monthly precipitation is 259mm, corresponding to the rainy season
About 19 rainy days per month, plan outdoor activities accordingly
High discomfort index with humidity of 82%
ja: 月降水量259mmで雨季に対応

湿度82％で不快指数が高い

月均约19天降雨，注意安排户外行程

ja: 折りたたみ傘やレインコート

ko: 월 20.6일 비가 와 야외 일정에 유의
en: Monthly precipitation is 218mm, corresponding to the rainy season
About 21 rainy days per month, plan outdoor activities accordingly
High discomfort index with humidity of 82%

湿度82％で不快指数が高い
zh: 月降水量218毫米，对应雨季
月均约21天降雨，注意安排户外行程

en: Bring a foldable umbrella or raincoat
Bring sunglasses and a hat
